turns.text: Hello Principal [Principal's Last Name], this is [Sales Agent Name] from Burger King. With graduation season approaching, I'm calling because many schools face challenges with large-scale catering. Before I go further, could you share roughly how many students are graduating this year, and what your biggest catering challenge for the event typically is?

I understand you might be busy, Principal. Many schools we've spoken with are looking for hassle-free options for graduation. Our new catering service simplifies feeding large groups, offering diverse, flame-grilled favorites students already love. We handle all the details so you can focus on celebrating their big day.
